description: linode_profile_security_question_list envelope: count and the full proto SecurityQuestion elements (not the Linode security_questions envelope). The first question has a saved response (gating the optional-string path); the second is unanswered, so its response is null and omitted. The endpoint is not paginated and applies no filter, so filter is omitted.

security_questions.question: In what city were you born?
In what city were you born?
